text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whew! I don't know what it is, but training felt extra good today!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I bet it's because I get really fired up
when I'm running with you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Me too, Kita. My legs are worn out!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know what'll help!
Let me give you a massage!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My mom used to give me them all the time,
so I've learned a few tricks!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Kita. That would be great.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But once we're done, I want you to teach me how to give massages.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I know your legs must be tired too.
We did the same run, after all.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Aw, Dia… Hehe, sure. I'll teach you later!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We'll run together, give each other massages,
and run again! No goal's too far, so long as
we're together!
